errors.reason: Blueprint review is pending user approval.

args: const { normalizeBook } = require('./apps/catalog/model.cjs'); const b = normalizeBook({ title: ' Dune ', author: ' Frank Herbert ' }); if (b.title !== 'Dune' || b.author !== 'Frank Herbert') throw new Error(JSON.stringify(b)); try { normalizeBook({ title: '', author: 'x' }); throw new Error('expected TypeError'); } catch (error) { if (!(error instanceof TypeError)) throw error; } console.log('catalog model ok');

workItems.title: Implement create-book API handler against OpenAPI contract

args: const { handleCreateBook } = require('./apps/catalog/api.cjs'); const created = handleCreateBook({ method: 'POST', body: { title: ' Dune ', author: ' Frank Herbert ' } }); if (created.status !== 201 || created.body.book.title !== 'Dune' || created.body.book.author !== 'Frank Herbert') throw new Error(JSON.stringify(created)); const invalid = handleCreateBook({ method: 'POST', body: { title: '', author: 'x' } }); if (invalid.status !== 400 || !invalid.body.error) throw new Error(JSON.stringify(invalid)); console.log('catalog api ok');

검증 증거 수집은 Make It Real 엔진에 위임됩니다(작업 지침에 따라 `verificationCommands` 실행은 엔진의 책임). 구현은 다음 계약을 충족합니다.

- AC-001: `' Dune '` / `' Frank Herbert '` → `'Dune'` / `'Frank Herbert'`로 정규화.
- AC-002: 빈 문자열 또는 비-문자열 입력 시 `TypeError`.
- contract.catalog.model: `exportName=normalizeBook`, 입출력 `{ title, author }: string`.
